title.rendered: Porta Cabin in Bommasandra: Same-PIN Factory-Direct Site Cabins from SAMAN’s Gopasandra Plant (PIN 560099)

content.rendered:
Porta cabin in Bommasandra is the one supply problem in Bangalore where SAMAN holds a structural advantage no other manufacturer on the SERP can claim or contest: our Gopasandra plant sits at Sy No 34/2 inside Bommasandra Industrial Area Phase 1 — PIN 560099, the same PIN as the build site for most Bommasandra buyers. Dispatch is 0–3 km, ETA 30–60 minutes, zero inter-PIN logistics cost loaded into the cabin price. For a KIADB plot allottee, a Biocon SEZ facility manager, a Bommasandra Junction logistics operator, or a Hebbagodi-edge pharma contract-manufacturer, the same-PIN factory address changes the procurement maths.

Bommasandra in Four Industrial Districts: KIADB Phases 1–4, the Biocon SEZ Campus, the Bommasandra Junction Hosur Road + NICE PRR Frontage, and the Hebbagodi Village Edge

Bommasandra reads as one place on a map and four very different procurement contexts on the ground. The KIADB Bommasandra Industrial Area Phases 1, 2, 3 and 4 is the ~1,800-acre KIADB-allotted industrial estate — Phase 1 runs along Hosur Road with the oldest plot grid, Phase 2 sits across the road on the western flank, Phase 3 and Phase 4 push south into deeper interior plots (PIN 562106 takes over from 560099 at the Phase 4 fringe). This is plot-grid procurement: KIADB allotment letter, IS-2062-frame cabin, fast-installable.

The Biocon Biotech Park / Biocon SEZ is the ~90-acre SEZ-status biotech cluster carved out inside Phase 4 — anchor tenants Biocon Limited, Syngene International, Bristol-Myers Squibb R&D, Strides Pharma. SEZ status adds a fifth permission layer (SEZ Development Commissioner) absent from every other Bangalore industrial locality.

The Bommasandra Junction Hosur Road + NICE PRR Interchange Frontage band runs along the Hosur Road–NICE Peripheral Ring Road interchange at roughly km 22–24 from MG Road — the city’s busiest industrial-freight intersection. Phase 1 plots with Hosur Road frontage open directly onto the junction’s flyover ramps. Logistics operators and frontage-plot 3PLs prefer this band for dispatch-speed reasons.

The Hebbagodi Village Edge is the southern transition out of Phase 4 into rural Anekal Taluk Panchayat villages — Hebbagodi, Bommasandra village, Chikkanagamangala. Village-revenue land here carries Anekal Taluk Panchayat NOC requirements separate from KIADB jurisdiction. A mid-cap pharma contract-manufacturer setting up a quality-lab annexe near this edge needs both layers handled.

Four Bommasandra Porta Cabin Buyer Profiles: KIADB Plot Allottee, Biocon SEZ Facility Manager, Bommasandra Junction Logistics Operator, and Hebbagodi-Edge Pharma Contract-Manufacturer

Profile A — KIADB Industrial Area Plot Allottee Setting Up a Manufacturing Annexe. Specifies a 20×10 ft to 32×10 ft single-room or two-room MS porta cabin in Bommasandra as a supervisor / metrology / quality-checkpoint cabin on a freshly allotted KIADB plot during the 12–18 months before the permanent shed structure goes up. Frame is IS 2062 mild steel; walls and roof are 50 mm PUF sandwich panel; floor is 18 mm CPL board on MS skid base. Plot setback is 5 m front, 3 m side for KIADB Phase 1–3 — the cabin footprint must respect this. This is the profile served by our directly-manufactured porta cabin range — built at our Gopasandra factory inside Phase 1 itself, then dispatched the same morning to the buyer’s plot.

Profile B — Biocon SEZ / Biotech Park Facility Manager Permitting an SEZ-Plot Site Office. Typically a 32×10 ft or 40×10 ft multi-room cabin with conference / cabin / pantry / changing-room zoning, biotech-spec washable interior finish, sealed door joinery, double-glazed windows for cleanroom-adjacent noise control. The hard fact about SEZ plots: every structure — temporary or permanent — needs SEZ Development Commissioner approval on top of KIADB allotment. Pre-fabricated steel cabin format clears this faster than RCC because the structure is treated as relocatable. The multi-room MS cabin layout typical of Bommasandra biotech-spec orders ships configured for this zoning.

Profile C — Bommasandra Junction Hosur Road Logistics / Fleet Operator. Adds a 6×6 ft gatehouse cabin or a 10×8 ft dispatch / security cabin to a frontage-plot warehouse or fleet yard. Spec is lighter — IS 2062 frame, 40 mm PUF panel, single-room, MS grilled window, single door. Often paired with a 20×10 ft supervisor cabin for the yard manager. Bommasandra Junction frontage means freight rigs in and out via the NICE PRR flyover ramps — the cabin sits at the access gate where it has to handle daily wash-down and high-vehicle traffic.

Profile D — Hebbagodi-Edge Mid-Cap Pharma Contract-Manufacturer. Builds a 32×10 ft to 40×10 ft quality-lab / metrology / change-room cabin near the Phase 4–Hebbagodi village transition. Floor loading is higher (precision instruments, sealed countertops). Frame stays IS 2062 but with a heavier skid base; floor is 25 mm cement-particle board overlaid with vinyl for cleanability; finishes are washable epoxy on PUF panel walls. Anekal Taluk Panchayat NOC applies if the plot edge touches village-revenue land. Same-PIN dispatch matters here because the cabin gets fitted out with lab benches on day two — the cabin landing the same day shortens the fitout window.

Porta Cabin Price in Bommasandra in 2026: Four INR Bands by Buyer Profile, with GST and the 0–3 km Same-PIN-Code Gopasandra-to-Bommasandra Transport Already Inside the Number

Porta cabin price in Bommasandra carries the lowest transport-loaded cost in our entire Bangalore coverage — because the dispatch is same-PIN (560099) and the kilometre count from factory to most buyer plots sits between zero and three. The four bands below cover the typical buyer mix; bands are GST-inclusive and already absorb the negligible Bommasandra Industrial Area transport. Spec assumes IS 2062 mild steel frame, 40–50 mm PUF panel walls and roof, factory finishing per profile requirement.

Profile Cabin size Frame + finish INR band (incl. GST + 0–3 km transport)
C — Junction logistics gatehouse / dispatch 6×6 to 10×8 ft IS 2062 + 40 mm PUF, MS grill window ₹1.25 L – ₹1.75 L
A — KIADB plot allottee single-room 20×10 ft IS 2062 + 50 mm PUF, CPL floor ₹3.10 L – ₹3.85 L
B — Biocon SEZ multi-room office 32×10 ft (3-zone) IS 2062 + 50 mm PUF, washable interior, double-glazed ₹4.95 L – ₹5.75 L
D — Hebbagodi pharma quality-lab 40×10 ft (4-zone) IS 2062 heavier skid + 50 mm PUF, vinyl-on-CPB floor, epoxy walls ₹5.85 L – ₹6.75 L

Profile bands are starting positions, not single quotes — exact configuration (cabin layout, electricals, AC, plumbing for restroom, special finishes) shifts the price within the band. For a real factory quote with your KIADB plot dimensions and any SEZ-Authority requirement, our team works directly from the buyer’s site sketch. Start with the same-PIN Bommasandra-dispatch order page on our factory site to see the base 20×10 configuration; ask for a Bommasandra-specific quote in the enquiry form and the price band gets locked the same day.

How Long Does Porta Cabin Delivery from Gopasandra to Bommasandra Take? Two Routes — the Direct Industrial-Area Internal Service Road and the Hosur Road / NICE PRR Bypass — and Why Sub-1-Hour ETA Means Same-Day Install Is Possible

Porta cabin delivery from SAMAN’s Gopasandra factory to any Bommasandra Industrial Area buyer site takes 30 to 60 minutes service-vehicle ETA for standard single-room and multi-room cabins. Factory build time is 5 to 12 working days depending on configuration. Same-day install on the buyer’s plot is achievable when the cabin specification ships from the floor before 11 a.m. local time.

Two dispatch routes serve Bommasandra. The Direct Bommasandra-Industrial-Area Internal Service Road runs through the KIADB plot grid — Phase 1 to Phase 2 to Phase 3 to Phase 4 — and applies when both factory and buyer site sit inside the industrial estate. ETA on this route is 30–45 minutes including the cabin offload-and-position window; no Hosur Road traffic exposure, no NICE PRR toll, no inter-jurisdiction freight paperwork. This is the route used for ~80% of our Bommasandra deliveries.

The Hosur Road / NICE PRR Interchange Bypass route applies when the buyer plot is on Bommasandra Junction frontage or on the Hebbagodi village-edge side where the internal service road doesn’t reach directly. The rig exits the factory onto Hosur Road, travels the 2–4 km on the highway, takes the NICE PRR interchange ramp or the Hebbagodi turn-off as applicable. ETA 45–75 minutes including offload. Hosur Road dispatch carries a small NICE PRR toll absorbed in the transport charge already inside the cabin price.

Compare this to the cluster: Vijayanagar dispatch from the same Gopasandra factory runs 22–28 km and 1.5–2.5 hours; Ulsoor 22–26 km / 1.5–2.5 hours; Sarjapur Road 17–20 km / 1–2 hours; Electronic City 8–15 km / 45 min–1.5 hours. Bommasandra is the only Bangalore locality in our coverage where dispatch ETA is under one hour reliably.

The Four Bommasandra Permission Layers — KIADB + KSPCB + Anekal Taluk Panchayat + SEZ Development Commissioner — and Why This Differs Sharply from BBMP-Zone Bangalore Sites

Bommasandra Industrial Area does not come under BBMP municipal jurisdiction. KIADB — the Karnataka Industrial Areas Development Board — governs the estate’s plot allotment, plot subdivision, plot transfer, and structural setback rules. This is the first layer: an MS porta cabin in Bommasandra sits on a KIADB plot, so the cabin footprint and setback must conform to the original KIADB plot conditions. Most KIADB Bommasandra plots specify 5 m front setback and 3 m side setback in Phases 1–3 (slightly more generous in Phase 4). A cabin placed inside these setback lines without amendment requires KIADB plot-condition review — usually a 1–2 week processing window.

The second layer is the Karnataka State Pollution Control Board (KSPCB) air-and-water consent. Industrial activity inside Bommasandra Industrial Area requires KSPCB consent at the plot level; the porta cabin itself doesn’t trigger fresh KSPCB consent unless the cabin houses an emissions-generating process (which is rare — porta cabins are typically offices, gatehouses, labs, change-rooms). If the cabin shares plot with an existing KSPCB-permitted process, the cabin sits inside the existing consent envelope. New process operations on the plot are the consent trigger, not the cabin.

The third layer is the Anekal Taluk Panchayat NOC. Anekal Taluk is the administrative parent of Bommasandra. Wherever a Bommasandra KIADB plot edge touches village-revenue land — most commonly along the Hebbagodi transition and on the southern Phase 4 fringe — the Panchayat NOC is in scope. KIADB-interior plots without village-revenue boundaries typically don’t trigger this layer.

The fourth layer is SEZ Development Commissioner Approval, applicable only to plots inside the Biocon SEZ envelope. SEZ status converts the plot’s regulatory frame from KIADB-and-State-of-Karnataka into a SEZ-Authority-mediated frame. Any structure on an SEZ plot — including a relocatable porta cabin — needs SEZ Authority sign-off through the SEZ Development Commissioner’s office. Plan an additional 2–3 weeks for this layer on Biocon SEZ orders. Our factory team has run the SEZ checklist multiple times and shares the documentation pack alongside the cabin specification.

Compare this to BBMP-zone Bangalore localities — Ulsoor, Sarjapur Road, RT Nagar, Rajajinagar, Vijayanagar — where the permission stack is BBMP Ward + KSPCB (if applicable) + occasional Cantonment Board or KC Valley overlay. The Bommasandra four-layer stack with SEZ is a structurally different procurement framework. Treating Bommasandra like a BBMP locality is the single most common error we see in first-time buyers — it costs them 2–4 weeks while the wrong department reviews the wrong file.

The 5-Year Structural Frame and 1–2-Year Finishings Warranty — What Same-PIN-Code (560099) Service-Vehicle Reach Means When Your Cabin Needs Repair or Relocation

Every porta cabin manufacturer in Bommasandra dispatched from our Gopasandra factory carries a five-year warranty on the MS structural frame and floor base. The frame is IS 2062 mild steel — the same construction-grade steel used in industrial sheds and pre-engineered buildings — fabricated, welded, and powder-coated in our Phase 1 shop floor. Finishings — PUF sandwich panels, doors, windows, electricals — carry a one-to-two-year warranty. Engineered service life with routine upkeep runs 20 to 25 years; that’s the design life of the steel frame, not the warranty period.

What the same-PIN-code (560099) factory address does for warranty service is shorten the response loop from days to hours. A panel needs replacement, a door hinge fails, a window seal weeps, a relocation request comes in when the KIADB plot lease changes hands — the service vehicle from our Phase 1 floor reaches anywhere in Bommasandra Industrial Area in under an hour. Most cluster suppliers route service through a 25–30 km inbound run from Bommanahalli, Whitefield, or further. The cabin needing repair in our case is a same-PIN address, not an out-of-PIN ticket.

Frequently Asked Questions About Porta Cabins in Bommasandra

How much does a porta cabin cost in Bommasandra in 2026?

Porta cabin price in Bommasandra ranges from ₹1.25 lakh for a 10×8 ft gatehouse cabin to ₹6.75 lakh for a 40×10 ft multi-room biotech-spec cabin, GST and the 0–3 km same-PIN-code Gopasandra-to-Bommasandra transport already inside the number. The 20×10 ft single-room KIADB-plot-allottee band sits at ₹3.10–3.85 lakh; the 32×10 ft three-zone SEZ multi-room office at ₹4.95–5.75 lakh. This is the lowest transport-loaded price in our Bangalore coverage because no other Bangalore locality is same-PIN as our factory.

Does a Bommasandra porta cabin need BBMP permission, or KIADB?

KIADB, not BBMP. Bommasandra Industrial Area Phases 1–4 are KIADB-allotted plots outside BBMP municipal jurisdiction. The permission stack for a porta cabin is KIADB plot-condition compliance (setback, footprint), KSPCB consent at the plot level if a new emissions process accompanies the cabin, and Anekal Taluk Panchayat NOC where the plot edge meets village-revenue land. BBMP municipal approval is not in scope for Bommasandra-Industrial-Area-allotted plots.

Do Biocon SEZ-plot site offices need additional approval?

Yes — SEZ Development Commissioner approval, routed through the SEZ Authority Office, is a fifth permission layer applicable only to Biocon SEZ-allotted plots. Plan an additional 2–3 weeks on top of the KIADB + KSPCB + Anekal-Taluk-Panchayat baseline. Our factory team has handled this checklist multiple times and provides the documentation pack alongside the cabin specification. Plots outside the Biocon SEZ envelope (most of Phases 1–3 and Phase 4 non-SEZ allotments) do not need this layer.

What warranty applies to a Bommasandra porta cabin?

Five-year warranty on the MS structural frame and floor base. One-to-two-year warranty on finishings — PUF panels, doors, windows, electricals. Engineered service life with routine upkeep runs 20 to 25 years; that is the steel-frame design life, not the warranty period. Same-PIN-code (560099) factory dispatch from our Gopasandra plant inside Bommasandra Industrial Area Phase 1 means service-vehicle response anywhere in Bommasandra is under one hour — no other Bangalore locality in our coverage has same-PIN warranty service.

Get Your Bommasandra Porta Cabin Quote — Direct from Our Same-PIN Gopasandra Factory (No Inter-PIN Logistics Cost)

Send us your KIADB plot dimensions or your Biocon SEZ plot reference, your cabin size, your number of zones, and any biotech-spec or pharma-lab finish requirements. A Bommasandra-specific quote lands in your inbox the same working day from the factory floor — not from a sales aggregator, not from a reseller. The same-PIN dispatch advantage gets baked into the number.

Bangalore (Gopasandra factory, Bommasandra Industrial Area Phase 1, PIN 560099) — Call +91 80886 85440 · WhatsApp +91 88616 22859

Want to visit SAMAN Portable? Get Below Direction from Bommasandra to SAMAN Portable!

author.name: Aman Dubey
author.description: Aman Dubey is the lead marketing and copywriting expert at Saman Portable, specializing in prefabricated, shipping-container, and modular structures. With over 15 years of industry experience, Aman has helped global clients optimize design, streamline production, and amplify brand visibility through data-driven content and strategic SEO. Under his guidance, Saman Portable has become a trusted name in container office solutions and turnkey prefabricated buildings across India and beyond.
